rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component names, ports, directions, data types, subcomponents, and connections as the input AADL model
Ensure that AGREE annex blocks are inserted in the correct scope to maintain valid model semantics
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annex blocks in invalid scopes that could disrupt the AADL architecture
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless they are represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
